section_name: Texas Council of Child Welfare Boards License Plates
text:
(a) The department shall issue Texas Council of Child Welfare Boards specialty license plates. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with the Texas Council of Child Welfare Boards, Inc.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of a special account for abused and neglected children established at the Department of Protective and Regulatory Services. Money in the account may be used only by the Department of Protective and Regulatory Services to fund programs and services supporting abused and neglected children under Section 264.004 (Allocation of State Funds) , Family Code.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 504. License Plates
##### § 504.642 — Texas Council of Child Welfare Boards License Plates

(a) The department shall issue Texas Council of Child Welfare Boards specialty license plates. The department shall design the license plates in consultation with the Texas Council of Child Welfare Boards, Inc.

(b) After deduction of the department’s administrative costs, the remainder of the fee for issuance of the license plates shall be deposited to the credit of a special account for abused and neglected children established at the Department of Protective and Regulatory Services. Money in the account may be used only by the Department of Protective and Regulatory Services to fund programs and services supporting abused and neglected children under Section 264.004 (Allocation of State Funds) , Family Code.

*Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B.2357), Sec. 208, eff. January 1, 2012.*

Money in the account may be used only by the Department of Protective and Regulatory Services to fund programs and services supporting abused and neglected children under Section 264.004 (Allocation of State Funds) , Family Code.
